Step 1 of 3

Welcome to Fair Flow

Let's get your business set up in a minute.

You can add more locations later under Apps → Management.

You're already set up as the Owner. No need to add yourself here — this step is only for other people who will use the app with you.
If you work alone, click Skip. You can always add staff later from Apps → Staff Members.

The teammate will be assigned to your new location automatically.

✓

You're all set!

Your business is ready. You can manage locations, staff, services and more anytime from Apps → Management.

Reset your password

Enter the email you use to sign in. We'll send you a link to reset your password.

Reset Admin PIN

Verifying reset link...

Enter a new 4-6 digit PIN for admin access.

✓ Admin PIN has been reset successfully. You can now use the new PIN to access admin actions.

My Profile

—

—

Details

Same fields as Staff Member → Details. Photo and email are above.

Account password

Uses your Firebase sign-in email.

Salon PIN

4–6 digits for in-app PIN flows.

Neo Nails

service@neo-nails.com

Locations

Manage your business locations. Each staff member can be assigned to one or more locations.

Add new location

Shared Setup

Manage shared data across all locations. Changes here affect all locations unless overridden.

Fair Flow Setup

Configure account-level point values and rank.

Task Templates

Task templates created here are available to all locations. Each location keeps its own task status.

New task template

Chat Messages

Chat templates and flows created here are available to all locations.

New chat template

Who can send this template?
Leave all unchecked to allow everyone.

New chat flow

Who can send this flow?
Leave all unchecked to allow everyone.
Decision Tree
Build a path: answer → next question. Leave "End flow" when that answer should send.

Inventory Catalog

Shared categories, subcategories, and item names for all locations. Each location keeps its own stock and current counts.

Categories
Subcategories
Items
Select a subcategory to manage item names.

New inventory item

New category

Add a shared inventory category.

Bulk add items

Paste one item per line. Format: Name or Name, Code, Default Price.

Password

Update your password to keep your account secure.

Notifications

Birthday Inbox reminders for this location.

Birthday reminders (Inbox)
Salon date from Preferences → Salon timezone. Birthdays in Staff → Details. While the app is open, checks about every 5 minutes.
Who sees it: managers / admins / owners — Inbox → Team → Open. Not the person whose birthday it is.
Days in advance must be ≥ full days until that birthday (salon date). E.g. birthday in 2 days → set at least 2.
Adds one test row to your Inbox.
For testing if reminders stopped firing.

Preferences

Organized into focused sections so location, display, and message settings are easier to manage.

Salon Location
Pin your salon's GPS coordinates. Used to verify staff and customers are on premises.
This setup is saved only for the active branch. Switch branch in the top bar before setting another salon location.
Branch coordinates
No salon location set
Stand at the salon entrance and tap Set — the browser will ask for location access.
How far from the pin counts as "on premises".
Enforce location check in
Applies across the whole app — calendars, schedule, and Time Clock weekly totals.
Calendar date for the business (birthday reminders, “today”). Auto uses this device’s timezone.
Used across tickets, inventory prices, and financial reports. Default: USD.

Staff Call Messages

Salon-wide messages for calls sent to technicians from Available and In Service.

Staff Setup

Set up your service providers.

Drag to reorder. You can add, edit and activate types.

Service Provider Types

No service provider types yet
Add your first service provider type to get started

Media Categories

Labels for uploads. Drag to reorder.

Categories

No categories yet
Type a name below and click Add

Schedule

Configure salon business hours and daily coverage targets for scheduling.

Weekly Schedule
Special Days
Set full-day closures or custom hours for specific dates.

Time Clock

Configure how working hours and overtime are counted. These rules will feed into staff timesheets and payroll.

Workweek starts on
The day timesheets and weekly overtime counters reset on. Set in Settings \u2192 Preferences \u2192 Week starts on so it stays in sync with the rest of the app.
Monday
Full-time target per week before overtime.
hrs
Typical shift length for a single day.
hrs
Enable overtime
Pay extra when staff exceed the weekly or daily thresholds below. Thresholds remain saved even when this is off.
Hours in a week before overtime kicks in.
hrs
Hours in a single day before overtime kicks in.
hrs
Rate paid for overtime hours. e.g. 1.5 = time-and-a-half, 2 = double-time. Minimum 1.
\u00D7
Current Plan — Monthly Price — Status Not connected Next Billing Date —

Change Password

This feature is coming soon.

Archive Staff Member?

This staff member will be removed from active staff and access will be revoked. Their data will be kept and can be re-activated later.

Delete Staff Member Permanently?

This will permanently delete this staff entry from the system and cloud. This cannot be undone.

Account Inactive

Your account has been archived and access has been revoked. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error.

You will be signed out automatically.
